description: For the elegant and sophisticated, this Intimately Yours by Beckham fragrance for men, has traces of aromas of fruits and greenery on an evening in the portico. Reminiscent of stylish evenings in the city, this eau de toilette, bottled in a delectable flask, has top notes of blood orange, and amalfi lemon, peppered with sandalwood and tonka bean. Quantity: 50 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
